'''âb-j-p-t''' ('''kabajpetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:japanise|japanise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:japanise|japanise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-j-p-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabajpetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibajpetoko|thibajpetoko]] || [[word:jibajpetoko|jibajpetoko]] || [[word:shibajpetoko|shibajpetoko]] || [[word:kibajpetoko|kibajpetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubajpetoko|thuthubajpetoko]] || [[word:jujubajpetoko|jujubajpetoko]] || [[word:shushubajpetoko|shushubajpetoko]] || [[word:kukubajpetoko|kukubajpetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubajpetoko|thubajpetoko]] || [[word:jubajpetoko|jubajpetoko]] || [[word:shubajpetoko|shubajpetoko]] || [[word:kubajpetoko|kubajpetoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobajpetoko|thothobajpetoko]] || [[word:jojobajpetoko|jojobajpetoko]] || [[word:shoshobajpetoko|shoshobajpetoko]] || [[word:kokobajpetoko|kokobajpetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobajpetoko|thobajpetoko]] || [[word:jobajpetoko|jobajpetoko]] || [[word:shobajpetoko|shobajpetoko]] || [[word:kobajpetoko|kobajpetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobajpetoko|thobajpetoko]] || [[word:jobajpetoko|jobajpetoko]] || [[word:shobajpetoko|shobajpetoko]] || [[word:kobajpetoko|kobajpetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbajpetoko|thĂŠbajpetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbajpetoko|jĂŠbajpetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbajpetoko|shĂŠbajpetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbajpetoko|kĂŠbajpetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabajpetoko|thabajpetoko]] || [[word:jabajpetoko|jabajpetoko]] || [[word:shabajpetoko|shabajpetoko]] || [[word:kabajpetoko|kabajpetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabajpetoko|thabajpetoko]] || [[word:jabajpetoko|jabajpetoko]] || [[word:shabajpetoko|shabajpetoko]] || [[word:kabajpetoko|kabajpetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
